title: kenoo #2758
definition:
1) to empty, make empty
    1a) of Christ, he laid aside equality with or the form of God
 2) to make void
    2a) deprive of force, render vain, useless, of no effect
 3) to make void
    3b) cause a thing to be seen to be empty, hollow, false
